fields.title: Add vitest coverage for sandbox policies (unit + gated integration)
fields.description: Add vitest coverage in tau extension workspace: policy merging, settings precedence, workspace root detection, realpath enforcement, approval decision logic. Add OS-gated integration tests for ASRT when env PI_SANDBOX_TESTS=1. DoD: green tests.
fields.close_reason: Added vitest coverage: approval.test.ts (38 tests for policy decision logic) + sandbox-bash.integration.test.ts (16 ASRT integration tests gated behind PI_SANDBOX_TESTS=1). Total: 83 tests (67 unit + 16 integration).
